_meta.author: easemize
_meta.title: Dynamic Hero
_meta.description: Elevate your landing page with this interactive React hero component. It captivates users with a unique arrow animation that tracks mouse movement, pointing towards the main call-to-action. Highly customizable, allowing you to define the heading, tagline, button text, and embed rich media (images or videos) in the designated card section. Seamlessly integrates with Tailwind CSS projects and follows modern React best practices for reusability.
